name: oyster-leaderboard-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker storing Rocket Ship easter-egg leaderboard scores

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute oyster-leaderboard --file=migrations/0001_init.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute oyster-leaderboard --file=migrations/0002_rate_limit.sql --remote
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute oyster-leaderboard --file=migrations/0001_init.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute oyster-leaderboard --file=migrations/0002_rate_limit.sql --local
scripts.db:dump: wrangler d1 execute oyster-leaderboard --remote --command="SELECT initials, score, datetime(created_at/1000,'unixepoch') AS dt FROM scores ORDER BY score DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT 50"
